title: Adobe Illustrator/InDesign Prepress Expert Needed – Create Print-Ready PDF with 5 Color Channels (CMYK + IFOIL Spot Layer)

full_description:
Title: Prepress Specialist Needed — Print-Ready PDF with 5 Channels (CMYK + IFOIL Spot Color for Digital Foil)

Description:
I'm looking for an experienced prepress/graphic production specialist to prepare a print-ready PDF for a premium gift wrapping paper product that will be printed using a digital foil process.
What I need:
A single print-ready PDF containing 5 color channels: the standard CMYK channels plus one spot color channel named exactly "IFOIL" (this naming is required by the printer). The IFOIL spot color layer must be set to overprint — this is critical for the digital foil process and must be configured before export.

Requirements:

Proven experience with spot color separations and prepress file preparation in Adobe InDesign or Illustrator
Understanding of overprint settings (Attributes panel / Ink Manager) and how to verify them in Overprint Preview or Acrobat's Output Preview
Ability to work from the printer's downloadable product template (I will provide the template, a sample PDF file, and my artwork)
Final deliverable verified to separate into exactly 5 plates: Cyan, Magenta, Yellow, Black, and IFOIL

Deliverables:

Print-ready PDF with the 5 channels described above, matching the printer's template dimensions and bleed
A screenshot from Acrobat Output Preview (or equivalent) showing the 5 separations, with IFOIL overprinting correctly
Source file (AI or INDD) with layers properly organized

To apply, please briefly describe: your experience with spot color/foil prepress work, examples of similar projects, your turnaround time, and your quote for this project.

skills: MARKET ANALYSIS | Market Analysis | Data Visualization | Google Slides | Powerpoint | Research Writing | Ghostwriting | Content Writing
full_description:
I need a polished, concise pitch deck that will help me secure early-stage investment for my startup. The story, visuals, and data all have to align so an investor can grasp our market opportunity and growth plan in minutes.

Scope 
Please develop a slide deck (PowerPoint, Keynote, or Google Slides) that blends strong narrative flow with clean, modern design. While you’re free to suggest the ideal slide order, the finished deck must contain these core sections:

• Market analysis – credible data, TAM/SAM/SOM visuals, and competitive landscape 
• Team introduction – photos, roles, and brief achievements that prove capability

Deliverables 
1. Editable slide file (pptx, keynote, or g-slides) 
2. PDF export ready for email sharing 
3. Source data and references for market and financial figures 
4. A short hand-off note explaining any placeholder areas I need to update

Acceptance Criteria 
• Clarity: an investor unfamiliar with our space should follow the story without extra explanation. 
• Consistency: fonts, color palette, and iconography aligned across all slides.

skills: API INTEGRATION | API Integration | C# Programming | Data Cleansing | Data Processing | Database Design | MySQL | PHP | Software Architecture | Software Development | Technical Documentation
full_description:
Automated IVMS Reporting System

Project Overview

We are looking for an experienced software developer or automation specialist to design and develop an automated reporting solution for our IVMS (In-Vehicle Monitoring System) operations.

The objective is to replace several manual Excel-based reporting processes with a single, reliable application that automates data processing, validation, consolidation, and report generation.

The successful solution should be scalable, maintainable, and suitable for future enhancements.

Detailed Scope of Work documents and sample reports will be provided to shortlisted freelancers.


Scope of Work

The solution will automate three related reporting processes:

* Weekly KM Report
* Weekly Exception Report
* Staff Risk Management Report

The application must be capable of:

* Importing raw data from CSV and Excel files.
* Validating source data before processing.
* Cleaning and standardizing imported data.
* Removing duplicates and invalid records.
* Matching and consolidating driver information across multiple datasets.
* Applying business rules during data transformation.
* Automatically handling reporting periods, including weeks that span multiple months.
* Maintaining cumulative month-to-date reporting.
* Preserving historical reporting data.
* Producing final reports that match our existing reporting format.
* Generating management-ready Excel reports with minimal manual intervention.

The solution should be designed to support future enhancements such as additional reports, dashboards, API integrations, scheduled processing, and database integration.

Deliverables

The successful freelancer will provide:

* A fully functional automated reporting solution.
* Complete editable source code.
* Technical documentation.
* User guide.
* Installation instructions.
* Testing and validation before handover.

Technical Approach

We intentionally have **no preferred technology stack

We are looking for an experienced developer to recommend the most suitable architecture based on the project requirements.

Your proposal should include:

* Recommended technology stack.
* Overall system architecture.
* Development approach.
* Advantages of your proposed solution.
* Estimated development timeline.

Required Experience

Applicants should have experience with one or more of the following:

* Reporting automation
* Data transformation
* Excel automation
* Desktop or web application development
* Data validation and cleansing
* Business process automation
* Database design and integration
* ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes

Experience working with large datasets and complex reporting logic will be highly regarded.

Proposal Requirements

Please include:

* A brief overview of your experience.
* Similar projects you have completed.
* Examples or portfolio (if available).
* Your recommended technical solution.
* Estimated project duration.
* Fixed-price quotation.
* Post-deployment support options.

Additional Information

This project involves implementing documented business rules rather than simply converting spreadsheets. Accuracy, reliability, maintainability, and scalability are critical.

full_description:
I want a single mobile application, running smoothly on both iOS and Android, that unifies day-to-day stock control with automated financial reporting. The idea is simple: I update purchases, sales, and closing stock on the go, and the app instantly reshapes those numbers into banker-ready statements—Balance Sheet, DSCR, CMA data, plus estimated and projected Balance Sheets.

Core functions I must have 
• Stock management: item master, GRN/inward, outward, valuation and alerts for low levels. 
• Financial statement preparation: one-tap generation of the documents listed above, formatted exactly the way banks expect (PDF and Excel export). 
• Reporting & analytics: visual dashboards, ratios, and period-to-period comparisons I can share or download.

A clean, intuitive UI is essential and the build should be genuinely cross-platform (Flutter or React Native suit me, but I’m open). All calculations have to be accurate and auditable, with the option to inspect or edit underlying ledgers before finalising any statement.

Deliverables 
1. Production-ready iOS & Android apps, published to TestFlight / internal track for review. 
2. Source code and brief developer-level documentation. 
3. Sample data set plus user guide that shows how to go from raw stock entries to a finished banker-format Balance Sheet.

Once the above is in place I’ll test it with live data; if the generated statements match my existing spreadsheets, the job is complete.

Features That No Existing Shop Software Has
Many shop apps already do billing and inventory. If you copy them, it will be hard to compete.
Instead, let's build an AI CEO for Shop Owners.
Feature 1: Business Health Score (0–100)
Every morning the owner sees:
Business Score: 82/100
Reason:
Sales increasing 
Expenses under control 
Customer credit too high 
Low stock on 3 items 
Feature 2: Profit Leak Detector
AI says:
"You spent ₹18,000 more on electricity this month than last month."
"Product A sells a lot but earns very little profit."
Feature 3: Smart Reordering
Instead of just "Low Stock", AI predicts:
"Based on the last 90 days, you should order 15 cartons of biscuits on Friday."
Feature 4: Cash Flow Predictor
"If you continue spending like this, your bank balance may fall below ₹20,000 in 12 days."
Feature 5: Loan Readiness (Your USP)
Only your software has:
Loan Eligibility Score
Working Capital Requirement
Estimated EMI affordability
Financial Ratio Analysis
Projected Balance Sheet
Projected P&L
Projected Cash Flow
Document Checklist
This is a natural extension of your banking expertise.
Phase 2: AI Chat
The owner asks:
"Can I hire another employee?"
"Should I increase the price of sugar?"
"Why did my profit fall this month?"
"Which supplier gives me the best prices?"
The AI answers using the shop's own data.
Long-Term Vision
Imagine 1 million Indian shopkeepers using your app every morning to understand their business.
That kind of vision is what can build a significant company.
One more idea
Once we validate the software, we can add an AI Loan Marketplace:
The app detects that a business is eligible for a loan.
The owner can choose to apply through participating banks or financial institutions.
The app prepares much of the required documentation automatically.
That creates value for shop owners while staying within applicable regulations and partnerships.

title: Copy-Paste Publishing Assistant(s) for a Nonprofit — 200 Listings/Day Catch-Up, Then Ongoing All Summer (Fully Prepared Content, Manual Only)
skills: DATA PROCESSING | Data Processing | Project Management | Data Entry | Customer Support | Virtual Assistant | Copy Typing | Time Management | Administrative Support | Data Management
full_description:
Copy-Paste Publishing Assistant(s) for a Nonprofit — 200 Listings/Day Catch-Up, Then Ongoing All Summer (Fully Prepared Content, Manual Only)

Category / skills: Data Entry, Virtual Assistant, Copy Typing

Description:

We're a U.S. 501(c)(3) nonprofit that arranges services for seniors, veterans, disabled neighbors, and families facing hardship. We've built an internal system that automatically writes a recruiting listing for every neighbor who needs help — privacy-screened, fully composed, ready to go. What we need is a human publishing partner (individual or small team) who copies each prepared listing from our private dashboard and pastes it onto a well-known volunteer-recruitment website, by hand.

Why by hand? Compliance. The destination website's terms require listings to be reviewed and published by a real person. So this role is 100% manual and that's non-negotiable: no bots, no scrapers, no browser automation, no macros, no scripts — ever. Any automation ends the engagement immediately. ** You are the human in the middle; that's the entire point of the role. **

The task, precisely. Each listing on the destination site is a 5-page form with about 25 fields (title, description, location, time commitment, screening questions, category tags, etc.). Sounds heavy — it isn't:

We supply every field. Each card on our dashboard shows the exact text for all 25 fields, page by page, in the same order as the form. You never write, guess, or improvise anything.
~21 of the 25 fields are identical every time. The site has a "duplicate listing" feature — after your first listing, you duplicate and change only what's unique: the title (each carries its own reference code that must be pasted exactly, never shortened), the description, the city, and the photo.
The photo is one click. Our dashboard generates a custom image per listing — click download, upload to the form, done.

After publishing, click "Mark posted ✓" on our dashboard. Our system verifies it automatically — that's how completed work is counted.
With rhythm, each listing takes 2–4 minutes: duplicate → paste title → paste description → set city → download/upload photo → publish → mark posted.

The volume, in two phases:

Phase 1 — Catch-up: ~3,000 listings at ~200/day (roughly 3 weeks). This clears our 90-day backlog of neighbors waiting for help.

Phase 2 — Ongoing: ~25–50/day for the rest of the summer at least, as new requests arrive daily. Strong Phase 1 performers get first claim on this follow-up project.

Teams welcome. 200/day is a full focused day for one person — so if you run a small team, our dashboard is built for it: each teammate types their name, claims a batch of listings with one click, and those listings leave everyone else's queue. Assignments are exclusive, so two people can never post the same listing. You split the day's 200 however you like.

What this is NOT: no writing, no research, no calls, no customer contact, no handling of personal data (our system strips all of that before you ever see a listing). Accuracy beats speed — we spot-check, and reference codes must match character-for-character.

Access: you'll be invited to the destination site under our organization's account with your own login, plus a password link to our dashboard. Nothing to install.

Pay & structure: Quote us your flat daily rate for 200 completed listings (a "completed listing" = published on the site and marked posted on our dashboard, where it's verified automatically; partial days pro-rated). Also quote your rate for the Phase 2 maintenance pace (25–50/day). We start with a small paid trial batch of 10 listings to confirm fit before awarding the ongoing work.

To apply: start your proposal with the word MOWER so we know you read this. Then: (1) Your high-volume form/data-entry experience — where? (2) Confirm in your own words that this must be done entirely by hand, no automation of any kind. (3) Your flat rate for one day of 200 completed listings, your Phase 2 rate, and whether you're solo or a team (how many people, hours, timezone).

full_description:
Light Novel Reviewer Needed (Reddit)

I'm looking for someone to read a portion of my light novel and write a thoughtful review for an appropriate Reddit community, such as r/LightNovels or a similar subreddit.

You'll be provided with multiple chapters so you have enough context to write a genuine, informed review.

The review should:

-Provide an overview of the story's premise, themes, atmosphere, and strengths.
-Avoid major spoilers, plot twists, or ending details.
-Be factually accurate and not misrepresent the series.
-Read naturally, with clean grammar and engaging writing suitable for Reddit.
Requirements
-An existing Reddit account with previous activity. It does not need to be your primary account, but I will need to verify that it has a normal posting or commenting history. Brand-new accounts will not be accepted.
-The review should be delivered as plain text (or a .txt file) for approval before it is posted.
The review must fit naturally within the chosen subreddit and follow that community's rules and style.

Payment

Your bid is the amount you will be paid. Please do not submit a low bid with the intention of negotiating for a higher payment later or asking what my budget is.

Completion Criteria
-The review must be approved by me before it is posted.
-After posting, you must provide a direct link to the Reddit post or comment as proof of completion. Screenshots will not be accepted.

Files Provided

Once the project begins, I'll provide:

The novel's title
A brief summary
The required chapters in EPUB format

If you enjoy reading light novels and can write an engaging, spoiler-free review, I'd love to hear from you.

full_description:
I’m producing a 60-second, 9:16 ad for Facebook and Instagram that promotes our cosmetic implant offer. The entire spot will be me on camera, but I need it generated with AI so the final video perfectly matches my face, lip-sync, and natural voice—not a look-alike avatar or synthetic narrator. 

What I will give you 
• 5–10 minutes of high-quality talking-head footage for model training 
• A finished script that runs about one minute 
• Six branded photos to act as dynamic backgrounds, each slotted at precise timestamps I’ll supply 

What I need from you 
1. A 20–30 second proof clip that shows my cloned likeness and voice in action. Once I sign off, you move straight into the full minute edit. 
2. The complete 60 second vertical video, exported in Meta-ready settings (1080×1920, h.264, streamed-audio, maximum compatibility). 
3. Seamless insertion of the six images as background plates at my provided timecodes, while keeping the pacing exciting and enthusiastic. 
4. Color, audio, and minor motion-graphics polish so the piece feels premium and scroll-stopping. 

Preferred tools are yours to choose—Runway, Pika, Synthesia, or custom pipelines are all fine—as long as the end result looks unmistakably like me and sounds exactly like my recorded voice. 

Please outline how you will handle face/voice cloning, the turnaround for the test clip, and any security measures for my reference footage. I’m ready to begin immediately and will be responsive with feedback.

skills: ADOBE ILLUSTRATOR | Adobe Illustrator | Vector Design | Print Design | 2D Drawing | Illustrator | Illustration | Graphic Design
full_description:
I have a detailed digital photo of an ornate Art Deco panel and I need it redrawn by hand in Adobe Illustrator as a perfectly clean vector. The piece is headed for large-format print, so every curve has to be razor-sharp and free of the bumps you see when Live Trace is used. 

Please capture all of the major geometric motifs, line weights and flourishes that give the design its character, but feel free to drop microscopic scratches or background noise—the goal is “simplified with key features,” not a forensic copy. Consistent stroke widths, neatly aligned symmetry and closed paths are essential because the printer will be enlarging this artwork significantly.

Deliverables 
• Layered AI file in CMYK, with strokes expanded only where necessary 
• High-res PDF (and/or EPS) ready for press 
• Small JPG proof so I can quickly compare it against the original reference 

I’ll supply the reference image the moment we start; just let me know if you need any additional specs such as final dimensions or spot-colour swatches. If you’re comfortable building precise Art Deco vectors from scratch, this should be a straightforward but satisfying project.

Front-End Developer (React + TypeScript) — Improve Our MVP Website

We've built the MVP of a real estate marketplace website, mostly using AI tools. It works but we need an experienced developer and UI/UX experience to make it look and feel premium, polished, and professional before we go live.

About 12-15 core pages: homepage, search results, listing detail, the "post a listing" flow, edit listing, user profiles, etc. We can discuss more in detail later and can also share the references of other websites what level we are aiming for.

React 18 + TypeScript (Vite)
Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
React Router, React Hook Form + Zod

Improve the look and feel of all pages to a premium standard.
Mobile-first most visitors will be on mobile, so it must look great on phones
Keep the design consistent across pages
Clean, tidy, reusable code
Smooth, simple animations (nothing flashy)

Must-have skills:

5+ years with React + TypeScript and UI/UX design.
Strong Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui experience.
A portfolio of polished, good-looking websites.
Comfortable improving an existing (AI-built) codebase
Good communication in English

Nice to have:

Real-estate or marketplace experience

How to apply:

Share your portfolio and live website links if any.

How we'll work:

More work to follow if it goes well
You'll work in a separate repo we provide with constant communication.
